---
name: Tuning request
description: Request a quality, wording, threshold, or triage improvement
title: "[Tuning]: "
labels: ["tuning", "needs-triage"]
---

## Affected file

Link or name the affected file.

## Current behaviour

Describe what is unclear, noisy, incomplete, outdated, or hard to use.

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement you recommend.

## Expected benefit

Explain how this helps analysts, engineers, reviewers, or contributors.

## Validation notes

Describe how the change should be reviewed before merge.
